projectDescription: Open protocol specification and developer reference for building integrations with Flic 2 and Flic Duo Bluetooth Low Energy smart buttons.
keyFeatures: Open BLE protocol specification for Flic 2 and Flic Duo buttons
Multi-app concurrent connection support via logical connection IDs
Cryptographic pairing with Ed25519 genuineness verification and X25519 key exchange
Five button event types: down, up, click, double click, hold
Four configurable trigger mode use cases for flexible event handling
Chaskey-LTS packet signature authentication for secure sessions
Flic Duo Push-Twist rotation sensor and dual-button support
Platform libraries for iOS, Android, Windows, Linux, and embedded C
Battery level monitoring and LED control
publicApiSurface: FullVerifyRequest1 / FullVerifyResponse1 (opcode 0) — full pairing setup initiation
FullVerifyRequest2 / FullVerifyResponse2 (opcode 2/1) — pairing key exchange completion
SetConnectionParametersInd (opcode 12 TO) — BLE connection parameter tuning
GetNameRequest / SetNameRequest / GetNameResponse (opcodes 11/10/16) — button name management
ForceBtDisconnectInd (opcode 6 TO) — force BLE disconnect with optional restart
InitButtonEventsDuoLightRequest (opcode 35) — Flic Duo dual-button event init
ButtonEventDuoNotification (opcode 32 FROM) — Flic Duo button events with gestures
EnablePushTwistInd (opcode 37 TO) — enable Flic Duo rotation sensor
PushTwistDataNotification (opcode 33 FROM) — Flic Duo rotation angle updates
StartFirmwareUpdateDuoRequest (opcode 38 TO) — Flic Duo OTA firmware update
